metadata.title: Solar Panel | Financing | Renewable Energy | Meezan Bank
metadata.description:
Meezan Solar – Power Your Home with Shariah-Compliant Solar Panel Financing
At Meezan Bank, we believe that clean energy is the way forward, and we’re committed to helping you make the switch with confidence. Our Solar Panel Financing Program is designed to provide you with affordable and accessible options to invest in renewable energy while also saving money on your energy bills. With Meezan Bank, you’ll have access to flexible payment plans, competitive pricing, and expert guidance to help you navigate the process with ease.

content: ed Meezan Energy Partner and the Customer. How to Apply Visit your nearest Meezan Bank branch or call our 24/7 Call Centre at 111-331-331 / 111-331-332 to initiate your application. Obtain quotation from Energy Partner authorized with Meezan Bank (list provided below). Submit a copy of your CNIC, signed application form (provided below), along with copy of latest electricity bill. Open an account with Meezan Bank for availing financing in minimal time. List of Required Documents List of Approved Energy Partners Application form Contact our Dedicated Representatives (Monday to Friday between 9am to 6pm) Mr. Azeem Ullah Cell No : 0331 2592705 Karachi / Hyderabad Mr. Faisal Iqbal No : 0331 2674004 / Hyderabad Mr. Nadeem Rahim Cell No : 0336 1517972 Islamabad / Rawalpindi / Peshawar Mr. Shahzad Mehmood Cell No: 0304 1927401 Lahore Mr. M. Adeel Cell No: 0302 8645238 / Peshawar Mr. Awais Butt Cell No: 0301 1189140 Faisalabad Mr. Rana Asif Altaf Cell No: 0300 6362042 Multan Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Salaried Pensioner Self Employed Businessman Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Would you like more information?
